name: -r
-R
--recursive
options.description: Recursively search subdirectories

name: -i
--ignore-case
options.description: Ignore case distinctions in patterns and input data

name: -n
--line-number
options.description: Prefix each line of output with the line number within its input file

name: -l
--files-with-matches
options.description: Print only the names of files containing matches

name: -c
--count
options.description: Print a count of matching lines for each input file

name: -v
--invert-match
options.description: Invert the sense of matching, selecting non-matching lines

name: -E
--extended-regexp
options.description: Interpret patterns as extended regular expressions

name: -w
--word-regexp
options.description: Select only lines containing matches that form whole words

options.name: --include
options.description: Search only files that match the given filename glob pattern

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Skip files that match the given filename glob pattern

options.name: --exclude-dir
options.description: Skip directories matching the given pattern

options.name: --color
options.description: Surround matching strings with color markers

name: -o
--only-matching
options.description: Print only the matched parts of a matching line

name: -q
--quiet
--silent
options.description: Do not write anything to standard output, exit with zero status if a match is found

name: -m
--max-count
options.description: Stop reading a file after the given number of matches

name: -A
--after-context
options.description: Print lines of trailing context after matching lines

name: -B
--before-context
options.description: Print lines of leading context before matching lines

name: -C
--context
options.description: Print lines of leading and trailing context around matching lines

name: -P
--perl-regexp
options.description: Interpret patterns as Perl-compatible regular expressions

name: -F
--fixed-strings
options.description: Interpret patterns as fixed strings, not regular expressions

name: -L
--files-without-match
options.description: Print only the names of files not containing matches

name: -H
--with-filename
options.description: Print the file name for each match

name: -h
--no-filename
options.description: Suppress the file name prefix on output
